title: Old Game Improved
description: "Old Game Improved" is a streamlined Minecraft modpack designed to enhance the core gameplay experience with minimal modifications.
body:
"Old Game Improved" is a streamlined Minecraft modpack designed to enhance the core gameplay experience with minimal modifications. Focusing on just a few powerful mods, this pack brings in the nature-focused magic of Botania and the homey customization options of MrCrayfish's Furniture. With these additions, "Old Game Improved" enriches the world with subtle yet impactful changes, allowing players to dive into a magical, cozy world without overwhelming them with too many mods.


<details>
<summary>Mods and credits</summary>
  
- [Baubles](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/baubles) by [Azanor13](https://www.curseforge.com/members/azanor13/projects)
- [Botania](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/botania) by [Vaskii](https://www.curseforge.com/members/vazkii/projects)
- [Iron Chests](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iron-chests) by [ProgWML6](https://www.curseforge.com/members/progwml6/projects)
- [MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod (Legacy)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mrcrayfish-furniture-mod) by [MrCrayfish](https://www.curseforge.com/members/mrcrayfish/projects)

A big thanks to all these dev who created these amazing mods!
 
</details>
